title: Titan Company Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Titan Company Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Titan Company Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Titan Company Digital Technologies:
Titan Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company Digital Technologies!
